parents.subject: LU-216 ldiskfs: use proper arguments for ldiskfs_free_blocks

commit.subject: LU-0000 clio: performance tune for cliff
commit.message:
LU-0000 clio: performance tune for cliff

A page in clio used to occupy 584 bytes, which will use size-1024
slab cache. This patch reduces the per-page overhead to 512 bytes
so it can use size-512 instead.

LU-4841 osc: revise unstable pages accounting
A few changes are made in this patch for unstable pages tracking:
1. Remove kernel NFS unstable pages tracking because it killed
   performance
2. Track unstable pages as part of LRU cache. Otherwise Lustre
   can use much more memory than max_cached_mb
3. Remove obd_unstable_pages tracking to avoid using global
   atomic counter

LU-2139 osc: make unstable pages track optional
I saw performance regression due to this patch set, so I make
this feature optional.

LU-0000 osc: Performance tune for LRU
Delete a contented lock oo_seatbelt
Other tiny changes for LRU management

LU-0000 llite: ll_cl_context fixes
Use per open file cache to reduce contention on cl_env cache.
dedicated ptlrpc thread for LRU.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ie764359c98c7b72e20b9a60127177c99a52fc017
